title: INSERT INTO ... EXCEPT ... fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tmp_c (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10,2));
CREATE TABLE tmp_d (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10,2));
INSERT INTO tmp_c (name, value) SELECT name, value FROM tmp_d WHERE (name, value) NOT IN (SELECT name, value FROM tmp_c);
key_bug_features: INSERT INTO with EXCEPT clause fails
